text: AI is transforming the modern workplace through automation and new productivity tools. Many routine tasks, such as data entry and scheduling, are now handled by AI systems, freeing employees to focus on more creative and strategic work. Productivity tools like smart assistants and automated data analysis help teams work faster and make better decisions. Rather than replacing humans entirely, AI often works alongside people—this is known as human-AI collaboration. However, some jobs are changing significantly; workers may need to learn new skills to operate AI tools or shift to roles that require empathy and problem-solving. Overall, AI creates both opportunities and challenges in the evolving workplace.
